notices.label: Launching
notices.body: markedwith.love. A letter app where distance shapes delivery.

notices.label: Available

notices.label: Reading
notices.body: The Odin Project curriculum. Slowly. On purpose.

notices.label: Wanted
notices.body: Collaborators who think before they build.

hobbies.label: Photography
hobbies.note: Mostly architectural. Mostly before 8am when the light is right and the city is quieter than it should be.

hobbies.label: Cars
hobbies.note: Specifically the ones over-engineered for the roads they'll actually drive on. Currently: BMW 440i Gran Coupé M-Sport.

hobbies.label: Watches
hobbies.note: A slow accumulation of interest that has not yet reached acquisition. The research stage is where it currently lives.

hobbies.label: Travel
hobbies.note: Preferably slow and loose from day three. The first two days can be structured.

hobbies.label: Computational Design
hobbies.note: The part of architecture that is secretly software. Grasshopper, Rhino, pyRevit.

hobbies.label: Web Development
hobbies.note: The Odin Project curriculum, by hand. This newspaper is partly the result.

hobbies.label: Architecture Criticism
hobbies.note: Dubai provides a great deal of material.
